MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUSLEN, WILLIAM DBA WILCHAR APARTMENTS SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 05 COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-08-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DEPT 4-JUDGE DESMOND, P. DOWLING, CSR; P. LEE, CLERK-C/C FOR CT TRIAL, ALL PRESENT EXCEPT DEFT, PRIMA FACIE CASE PRESENT JUDGMENT ORDERED FOR PLT & AGAINST DEFT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, EDWARDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 449 O'FARRELL ST, #206 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102 $1,435.50 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,835.50, LEASE FORFEITED, PLT WAIVED COSTS.
